<section id="dsl_counter_root" class="live-ui-layout live-ui-layout--vbox" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px" data-live-ui-kind="vbox" data-live-ui-widget-id="dsl_counter_root"> <p id="dsl_counter_label" class="live-ui-text" style="" data-live-ui-widget-id="dsl_counter_label"> </p> <button id="dsl_increment_button" type="button" class="live-ui-button" style="" phx-click="click" phx-value-widget_id="dsl_increment_button" phx-value-widget_kind="button" phx-value-event_click_intent="increment"> Increment </button> </section>
